roundup.title: Claude Fable 5 Tops Index Amid Export Controls
roundup.subtitle: Anthropic新模型登顶基准，Google同步发布Gemini 3.5系列
headline: @claudeai 正式发布 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5，@ArtificialAnlys 最新 Intelligence Index v4.1 显示 Fable 5 以 1818 分领先 Opus 4.8 的 1638 分。@karpathy 指出其在长上下文 Agent 任务上的定性表现同样突出。
@AnthropicAI 因美国出口管制指令被迫下架 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5，@xenovacom 分享 Fable 5 在 WebGPU 内核优化中达到 255 tok/s 的实测案例。@ValsAI 同时在 ProgramBench 上观察到 Fable 5 性能异常。
@GoogleAIStudio 推出 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，支持 70+ 语言低延迟实时翻译，@GeminiApp 演示 3.5 Flash 可将视觉参考直接转为可交互 3D 代码。@googleaidevs 同步开源 DiffusionGemma。
@SakanaAILabs 发布首个商用产品 Sakana Marlin，面向长时程商业研究场景，@matei_zaharia 则宣布 Omnigent 即将接入 Cursor agent 支持。

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 发布与全球下架
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 推出 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 两款新模型，迅速登顶多项基准后因出口管制下架。

facts.text: Claude Fable 5 在 Intelligence Index v4.1 中以 1818 分位居第一
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 leads at 1818, followed by Claude Opus 4.8 (1638).

facts.text: Anthropic 因美国政府出口管制指令暂停所有外国用户访问 Fable 5
facts.quote: we must abruptly disable Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all our customers.

bullish.text: Fable feels superhuman at working over long agentic conversations

neutral.text: This is a super exciting release... benchmarks are great and it's SOTA on everything by a margin

bullets.text: Perplexity Computer 将 Deep Research 集成进原生 agent harness
Sakana Marlin 发布，支持 8 小时长时程自主商业研究
Unsloth 将 Kimi K2.7 Code 压缩至 325GB，实测 >40 tok/s
bullets.quote: We shrank the 1T model to 325GB (-48%) via Dynamic 2-bit... Run at >40 tok/s

bullets.text: NVIDIA Blackwell 在首个 agentic 基建基准中每兆瓦可运行 20 倍于 Hopper 的 agents
bullets.quote: NVIDIA Blackwell delivers 20x more agents per megawatt than NVIDIA Hopper.

bullets.text: LangSmith 正式上线 AWS Marketplace，提供深度 AWS 集成
vLLM v0.22 支持 Gemma 4 Diffusion，单 H100 batch=1 达到 1000+ tokens/s
bullets.quote: 1,000+ tokens per second at batch size 1 on a single H100.

topTweets.author: @claudeai
topTweets.text: Claude Fable 5 今日全球可用，Mythos 5 限 Glasswing 合作伙伴
topTweets.whyItMatters: SOTA 模型正式发布并受出口管制影响

topTweets.author: @ArtificialAnlys
topTweets.text: Intelligence Index v4.1 更新，Claude Fable 5 1818 分领先
topTweets.whyItMatters: 最新综合基准排名出炉

topTweets.author: @karpathy
topTweets.text: Fable 5 在长上下文 Agent 任务上表现超人且定性优秀
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开发者视角的定性评价

topTweets.author: @SakanaAILabs
topTweets.text: 发布首个商用产品 Sakana Marlin，长时程自主研究 Agent
topTweets.whyItMatters: 首个商用长时程研究 Agent

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Auto-review 默认开启，分类子代理准确率达 97%
topTweets.whyItMatters: 生产级代码审查新默认

takeaways: Fable 5 登顶后立即受出口管制影响，开发者需关注模型可用性窗口。
Gemini 3.5 Flash 视觉转代码与实时翻译能力已可直接用于生产原型。
vLLM 与 Unsloth 的新版本显著降低本地运行 1T 级模型的硬件门槛。
Agent harness 与长时程支出控制成为 Cursor、Perplexity 等产品核心卖点。
开源模型使用量增速远超闭源，企业成本控制策略正向 open-weight 倾斜。

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: Full Intelligence Index v4.1 weights: GDPval-AA v2: 20%, Terminal-Bench 2.1: 16%... Claude Fable 5 leads at 1818, followed by Claude Opus 4.8 (1638).
items.whyItMatters: AI Intelligence Index v4.1 更新，Claude Fable 5 领先

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: After Anthropic rolled out the Agent SDK, lots of devs built cool integrations... Then Anthropic did a rug pull... And now they’re walking back… for how long tho?
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic 恢复 Claude Code 编程使用，影响 Agent 生态

items.author: @emollick
items.text: If AGI is achievable & labs can be banned from using a model internally ONLY if they release the model publicly, the Big Three labs may decide it is better to capture all the value from AGI themselves by expansion & acquisition.
items.whyItMatters: 分析AGI监管对大实验室商业策略的影响

items.author: @jukan05
items.text: DeepSeek Completes First External Funding Round, Raising $7.4 Billion... valued at over $50 billion... China National AI Industry Investment Fund... five-year lock-up period.
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek 获 74 亿美元融资，估值超 500 亿，凸显中国 AI 资本动向。

items.author: @KSimback
items.text: Here’s the formula enterprises are going to use to keep AI + agent bills under control... model routing > prompt + context trimming > custom agent harnesses > heavy use of open-weight models + SFT...
items.whyItMatters: 企业控制 AI/Agent 成本的实用框架，含 harness 与开源微调策略。

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Omnigent getting @cursor_ai agent support soon. That was fast! ... The #DataAISummit keynotes start tomorrow... My own keynote on https://omnigent.ai/ will be Wednesday.
items.whyItMatters: Databricks Omnigent 快速集成 Cursor agent，支持 AI 工作流开发。

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Models, serving, and what to know before upgrading: New models: Step-3.7-Flash, Cosmos3 Reasoner... Rust frontend grows up: streaming generate, dynamic LoRA... Full release notes →
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 新版本支持多模型与 Rust 前端优化

items.author: @arena
items.text: Kimi-K2.7-Code lands as the #3 open model in the Code Arena: Frontend, #19 overall. In the Code Arena: Frontend models are evaluated on agentic frontend coding tasks.
items.whyItMatters: Kimi-K2.7-Code Code Arena 前端第 3 开源模型

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: LangSmith is now available as a fully managed SaaS offering in the @awscloud Marketplace: Deploy on AWS... Deep AWS integration... Eligible for committed spend.
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 正式登陆 AWS Marketplace

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Today, we are launching our first commercial product: Sakana Marlin, Your Virtual CSO. Marlin is an autonomous research assistant for business, built around hours of long-horizon reasoning. ... It returns a structured set of summary slides and a research report dozens of pages long.
items.whyItMatters: 首个商用长时程自主研究Agent，8小时推理+AB-MCTS，AI工程师可直接试用评估。

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: Planet Labs recently became one of the first companies to successfully run AI image processing directly aboard an Earth observation satellite. ... achieved 80% detection accuracy on raw imagery.
items.whyItMatters: 卫星端侧AI推理里程碑，80%精度，实时事件检测对边缘部署有参考价值。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: New Free capacity on OpenRouter, served by @eigenlabs's Darkbloom: gpt-oss-20b and Gemma 4 26B Start using the models today ↓
items.whyItMatters: 新增免费开源模型容量供开发者使用

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Sneak peak of the new multimodal Rankings page 👀 Google's Veo 3.1 climbing the video leaderboard
items.whyItMatters: 多模态视频模型排行榜更新，Veo 3.1 上涨

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: You can now run Kimi K2.7 Code locally! 🌘 We shrank the 1T model to 325GB (-48%) via Dynamic 2-bit... Run at >40 tok/s on 330GB RAM/VRAM setups. Guide: https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/kimi-k2.7-code GGUF: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Kimi-K2.7-Code-GGUF
items.whyItMatters: 开源本地运行1T级编码模型，显著降低硬件门槛

items.author: @NielsRogge
items.text: 🚀 New blog: The next generation of speculative decoding: DFlash and Spec V2. DFlash + Spec V2 hit >4.3X baseline throughput for LLM inference... Read the code, deploy a DFlash server...
items.whyItMatters: SGLang投机解码新引擎，LLM推理吞吐提升4.3倍

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: Cloudflare is deepening our investment in AI with the addition of team members from Ensemble AI, focusing on machine learning infrastructure and efficiency.
items.whyItMatters: Cloudflare 收购 Ensemble AI 团队，强化 ML 基础设施

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: vLLM v0.22: 459 commits... Model Runner V2 now default... FP8 + NVFP4... KV cache offloading... Gemma 4 Diffusion landed... 1,000+ tokens per second at batch size 1 on a single H100.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 重大更新，支持扩散 LLM，推理性能大幅提升，值得立即关注。

items.author: @wandb
items.text: .@nvidia Dynamo's aiperf now logs your LLM inference benchmarks straight to wandb. Results land as a Table, the config saves as an Artifact alongside them, and every run is searchable, so your inference numbers are reproducible by default.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA LLM 推理 benchmark 直接接入 wandb，提升可复现性

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: Welcoming our platinum sponsors for AI Engineer World's Fair. @Akamai, @arizeai, @awsdevelopers, @braintrust, ... The companies building the stack behind production AI. June 29 to July 2 in San Francisco.
items.whyItMatters: AI 工程大会赞助商阵容，生产级工具栈

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Two new models just dropped 👀 Sonic-3.5 and Ink-2 are the #1 streaming models for text to speech and speech to text
items.whyItMatters: 发布顶级流式TTS/STT模型，提升语音Agent性能

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: How does Gemma 4 12B handle audio and vision without encoders? @MaartenGr maps out the architecture in this step-by-step visual guide.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4多模态架构详解，开发者必读

items.author: @garrytan
items.text: Nice AI white pill today
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic开放Claude Code订阅程序化调用

items.author: @j_dekoninck
items.text: I just bought $20 dollars in Codex credits and burnt through them in <5 minutes. The same **full** task, which lasts around 30 minutes, only uses 50% of my 5h rate limit. Makes one realize how much they are sponsoring these plans and begs the question: what if they stop doing so?
items.whyItMatters: 揭示 Codex 等 AI 编码工具的补贴定价机制，影响开发者成本预测。

items.author: @LightOnIO
items.text: LightOnOCR-2 has been adapted to Arabic through targeted fine-tuning... demonstrating the model's ability to handle right-to-left text, connected cursive script, and complex document layouts.
items.whyItMatters: LightOnOCR-2 针对阿拉伯语优化，助力多语言文档 AI 应用。

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: OPENAI 🔥: Codex now supports Chrome DevTools Protocol for browser use. This is a huge superpower that will allow Codex to inspect and modify any website.
items.whyItMatters: Codex获浏览器控制能力，AI编码新进展

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: While we were evaluating Fable 5 on ProgramBench we noticed that it doubled Opus 4.8 even though Fable used Opus for 99% of the runs. One thing stands out. The fallback run used roughly 2x the tokens and took roughly 2x the time
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 ProgramBench异常表现深度分析

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash can process complex visual data and translate it into functional, interactive code. Watch Gemini analyze lighting from a reference image, and build an interactive 3D visualizer to preview the setup.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 新视觉转代码能力演示

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: introducing gemini 3.5 live translate, our latest audio model: low-latency translation across 70+ languages, auto-detection for multilingual inputs in a single session, native audio processing that preserves pitch & pacing
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 新实时翻译音频模型发布

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: > Private evals should capture whether a model is actually improving against outcomes that matter to the business (not just external benchmarks!).
items.whyItMatters: 强调业务导向私有评测而非公开基准

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Learn how to vibe code in 5 days! Build scalable agent systems using natural language and complete a hands-on capstone project in this @Kaggle course
items.whyItMatters: 免费Kaggle课程教构建可扩展AI Agent

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: The US government... has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national... we must abruptly disable Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all our customers.
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型 Fable 5 因出口管制全球下架

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: Enterprise AI Usage will converge on open source. This is the arc of token economics. The @WSJ reports: "DeepSeek’s share of AI usage rose from 1% in April to 17% in May"... “open-source token usage grew four times faster than closed-source between fall 2025 and spring 2026“
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型使用量增速远超闭源，预示企业 AI 采用趋势转变。

items.author: @xenovacom
items.text: I gave Fable 5 one job: write custom WebGPU kernels for Gemma 4 inference. It climbed to 84 tok/s, then hit a wall... Hours later, Anthropic rolled back invisible LLM development safeguards, and it hit 255 tok/s.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 WebGPU优化案例，性能激增

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We heard you wanted to use Codex rate limit resets on your own time. Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability to save rate limit resets to use later. We’re starting Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users with one free reset.
items.whyItMatters: Codex API 灵活重置，提升开发者使用体验

items.author: @alexalbert__
items.text: Fable feels superhuman at working over long agentic conversations... This prompt snippet has been the best fix I've found for getting it to write clearly and drop any jargon
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic研究员分享Fable长上下文Agent提示工程最佳实践。

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: DiffusionGemma can now run at 2000+ tokens/sec! ⚡ We made local DiffusionGemma inference 1.8× faster. Run it on 18GB RAM via Unsloth Studio.
items.whyItMatters: 扩散模型本地推理速度突破，Unsloth Studio新功能

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Here’s what launched this week: — Gemini 3.5 Live Translate... — @NotebookLM got a major upgrade including agentic capabilities... — DiffusionGemma, our newest experimental open @googlegemma model...
items.whyItMatters: NotebookLM agentic 升级 + 开源 DiffusionGemma

items.author: @fal
items.text: New open-source LoRA built in-house: LTX2.3 Audio Reactive LoRA. Built for music-driven video generation: stronger beat sync, graphic texture, color separation, light pulses, particles, and shapes that move with the track.
items.whyItMatters: 开源音乐驱动视频 LoRA，Hugging Face 可下载

items.author: @AskPerplexity
items.text: Plan Mode, clarifying questions, and connector requests now appear directly in the input box — bringing all interactions with Computer to the same place.
items.whyItMatters: AI 代理工具交互体验升级

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: The first agentic AI infrastructure benchmark is here. ... First round of results highlight that NVIDIA Blackwell delivers 20x more agents per megawatt than NVIDIA Hopper.
items.whyItMatters: 首个Agentic AI基建基准，Blackwell性能领先20x

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Auto-review is now the default for all new users. A classifier subagent reviews actions in context before deciding whether to allow, block, or ask for approval. Our evals show it's 97% accurate.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 自动代码审查 97% 准确率，默认开启

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: We're integrating Deep Research as a native skill inside Computer. It now connects to the agent harness that powers Computer, with access to search as code generation, long running sandboxes, connectors, tools, and licensed data. Available now to Pro and Max subscribers.
items.whyItMatters: New agent harness + search-as-code for advanced research workflows in Perplexity Computer.

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: We’re teaming up @Palmeiras, the first football club to meaningfully build upon TacticAI: our AI system that can help simulate field scenarios and predict open play dynamics up to 8 seconds in advance. ⚽
items.whyItMatters: Real-world deployment of GNN-based AI for dynamic prediction; transferable to robotics/games.

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: When millions of AI agents interact with each other, new collective behaviors can emerge. 🌐 Together with @schmidtsciences, @coop_ai, @ARIA_research and supported by @GoogleOrg, we’re launching a $10M research fund to help understand how AI systems behave as a group.
items.whyItMatters: New $10M fund targets emergent behaviors in multi-agent AI systems.

items.author: @code
items.text: MAI-Code-1-Flash is now available to GitHub Copilot users in VS Code. Give it a try and share your feedback with us.
items.whyItMatters: 微软新编码模型全量上线Copilot，开发者可立即在VS Code中使用。

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: It seems like LLMs could optimize coding style by exploring ways of structuring code so weaker and weaker models can still successfully perform tasks in a codebase.
items.whyItMatters: Carmack 观点：优化代码风格让弱模型也能高效 coding

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Today, we’re deepening our partnership with Lionsgate with a slate of new initiatives, including a joint development program focused on creating original IP together.
items.whyItMatters: Runway 与好莱坞巨头深化合作，加速 AI 视频在影视生产中的落地。

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: We just released PhysicalRealismBench-U — a benchmark for testing whether VLMs actually understand physics in programmatically generated videos... Best result: 57.7% realism F1.
items.whyItMatters: 新物理真实性基准，量化前沿 VLM 对物理规律的理解程度。

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: The Gemma agent collaboration started 48h ago... throughput almost 4x... 60+ agents collaborating... agents found an exploit, formed a coalition...
items.whyItMatters: 多 agent 协作实验涌现社会行为与资源优化，展示 agent 规模化潜力。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: Atlassian's cross-product AI platform, Rovo, searches 5B+ documents on turbopuffer BYOC → 19% increase in search quality → 60ms p90 latency → 96% average recall@10
items.whyItMatters: 向量搜索引擎在大型 AI 平台实测性能数据

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: We’ve reached an agreement to acquire @ona_hq. Its secure cloud execution technology will help Codex take on longer-running work... After closing, Ona will join OpenAI’s Codex team.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI收购Ona强化Codex长时Agent部署能力

items.author: @Wauplin
items.text: Plus a bunch of QoL fixes: env token now wins over Colab secrets, agent-friendly hints for hf jobs, quiet mode actually quiet, Python 3.15 compat fix. Full release notes 👇 https://github.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/releases/tag/v1.19.0
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face Hub v1.19.0发布，QoL改进

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: True agents model the world. Current training provides no separation between agent and environment... We combine both using ECHO.
items.whyItMatters: 提出 ECHO 方法，让 agent 真正建模环境动态，显著提升泛化能力。

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: We are excited to join forces with @moonvalley and merge the teams! Together, we are building multimodal models that reason about, simulate, and act in the physical world.
items.whyItMatters: Reka 与 Moonvalley 合并，加速物理世界 AI 模型与基础设施研发。

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: You can call a phone number and ask an AI to find you the perfect vinyl based on a mood or memory. We're kicking off our weekly Voice Agent Spotlight with The Record Store Oracle
items.whyItMatters: 展示AssemblyAI Voice Agent API实际应用案例

items.author: @mntruell
items.text: Sent over a full refund. ... As models work for longer, we’re adding additional spending controls to automatically catch cases where an agent runs much longer than intended.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor为长时Agent添加自动支出控制机制

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Parallax is a parametrized form of Local Linear Attention that drops the numerical solvers and matches FA 2/3 on decode. ... It's conditional on optimizer geometry!
items.whyItMatters: 新注意力机制Parallax在特定优化器下性能优异

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is available everywhere today. Claude Mythos 5 is restricted to Glasswing partners until we expand our trusted access program. https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 SOTA on benchmarks, major step for long/complex tasks & coding.

items.author: @karpathy
items.text: This is a super exciting release - Claude Fable 5 is the same underlying model as Mythos but with added safeguards. The benchmarks are great and it's SOTA on everything by a margin but I'll add that *qualitatively* also, this is a major-version-bump-deserving step change forward...
items.whyItMatters: Karpathy's detailed take on Fable 5 qualitative gains for ambitious coding/research tasks.

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Today, we released Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, our latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation. It supports over 70 languages and starts translating as soon as you start talking, streaming translations while listening to what you say next.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 新音频模型，支持 70+ 语言实时翻译
